title: ProtocolLab WebTransport Contract Verification
scope: Verify WebTransport public contract structure only; executable implementation, executor, package, lab, and performance proof remain implementation-owned.
verification_method: Schema validation, scenario-suite-profile reference resolution, deterministic payload recomputation, trace-link validation, and official protocol-source inspection.
procedure: Validate the typed WebTransport scenario and load profile.
Confirm the suite selects the exact scenario and profile.
Confirm validation requires WebTransport over HTTP/3 without fallback.
Confirm required metrics and artifacts cover session establishment, stream echo, byte and hash integrity, outcomes, and raw evidence.
Confirm the smoke profile is non-publishable and non-rankable by contract.
expected_result: The public repository exposes one coherent executable-contract-ready WebTransport stream lane without implying target or executor support.
